name: Engineering-as-Marketing Tools Registry
description: Public-safe registry of engineering-as-marketing tools connected to the FundReady / Funding Readiness Scorecard ecosystem.

items.name: FundReady Scorecard
items.description: Public self-assessment that routes business owners into readiness tiers and educational next steps.
items.persona: Small business owners and funding prospects

items.name: FundReady Copilot
items.description: Published Custom GPT that checks readiness signals, explains funding path categories, and recommends public-safe next steps.
items.persona: Small business owners and funding prospects

items.name: Funding Knowledge Base Example
items.description: Static public-safe example page that explains funding readiness concepts without private partner routing.

items.name: FundReady Gemini Gem
items.description: Portable prompt spec for a public-safe Gemini Gem that helps users understand funding readiness inputs.
